word: H439 - אַלֹּון בָּכוּת - ʼAllôwn Bâkûwth - al-lone' baw-kooth' - Allon-bachuth

sections.paragraph:
Original: אלּון בּכוּת

Transliteration: 'allôn bâkûth

Phonetic: al-lone' baw-kooth'

BDB Definition:

Allon Bachuth = "oak of weeping"
  1. site of Deborah's (Rebekah's nurse) grave near Bethel

Origin: from H437 and a variation of H1068

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
